summary: Moved DFM object selection into the Details page.
details: Opening a DFM tab now lands directly on Details. The Details Name field has a project/path-scoped selector backed by the reserving class folder's method_index.json, and selecting a name uses the normal local method lookup to load that DFM object.
The Details page groups Project, Reserving Class, and Name under Object Path with Output Vector, Input Triangle, and settings under Method Inputs & Settings.
